regions.text: A night watchman keeps a studio safe. He carries a time clock and visits different stations all night.
At each station, he pushes the clock against a key. This prints a record on a roll of paper inside the clock.
This records exactly when he visited each station. If no number is printed, it's proof he missed that spot.
danger: DANGER OF DEATH / KEEP OUT. (Illustrations: Watchman's route, time clock mechanism, and danger sign).
